title: hieracium alpinum subsp. vitellicolor
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. vitellicolor, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium alpinum subsp. vitellicolor include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in the treatment of various health issues, including digestive problems and fever.
